case_title: GABRIEL GAGNER VS. BELONG HOME, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2024 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAGNER, GABRIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BELONG HOME, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
